title: Innovation of the Next Generation | Exploring AI Models | Part 4 | Horizons
fulltitle: Innovation of the Next Generation | Exploring AI Models | Part 4 | Horizons
description:
The next generation isn’t just adapting to AI—they’re building the future with it. 

From DIY AI-powered wearables to real-time ASL translation tools, young innovators are proving that AI isn’t just for corporations—it’s for anyone with an idea, creativity and a little ingenuity.

In this episode of Horizons, #TechArtist and CEO of Future Proof Creatives Kris Krüg shares inspiring stories of young creators pushing the limits of what’s possible with AI. This is what the AI Renaissance looks like—bold, creative, and open to everyone.

The future of #AI is already here—and it’s being shaped by the next generation.
Watch all videos: https://horizons.compassdatacenters.com/series/exploring-ai-models-the-future-of-machine-learning

#Horizons #FutureOfWork #GenerativeAI @van_ai
